title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; simple interface to chat with local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI); markdown, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, and custom timeout support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with chat history, model switching, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like server backed by Ollama models for code completion in VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs and Markdown.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models; slash commands, moderation, and model pick.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package exposing TypeScript-friendly client for Ollama REST API.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package on PyPI; install with pip and talk to Ollama in two lines.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot leveraging Ollama for private, on-prem AI assistance with thread support and model selection.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with Tokio.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model preload.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Lightweight RAG chatbot combining Ollama embeddings, llama.cpp, and SQLite vector search.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated registry of custom Ollama Modelfiles for fine-tuned and niche models.
